modmenu.summaryTranslation.seamlesssleep: Never blink through the night again.
modmenu.descriptionTranslation.seamlesss:
Rethinks the way players sleep:

§8-§r Smooth & Synced animation
§8-§r Visual improvements
§8-§r Minimal server impact

Now available for: §3§lForge§r, §6§lNeoForge§r and §f§lFabric§r!
Discord: gabrielfl4
config.seamlesssleep.title: Seamless Sleep Settings
config.seamlesssleep.sleep.chat_text_opa: Adjusts chat text transparency while you are in bed.
config.seamlesssleep.sleep.chat_backgrou: Adjusts chat background transparency while you are in bed.
config.seamlesssleep.overlay.enabled.des: Shows the "sleeping" overlay message during the transition.
config.seamlesssleep.overlay.darkness.de: Controls how dark the screen gets while sleeping.
config.seamlesssleep.chat.dim_multiplier: Adjusts the chat dimming intensity while sleeping (keeps text/background ratio).
config.seamlesssleep.chat.max_lines.desc: Limits the number of chat lines visible while in bed. Set to 0 to hide chat.
config.seamlesssleep.camera.tilt_degrees: Direct camera tilt angle while sleeping. 0 matches vanilla horizon.
config.seamlesssleep.sleep.clears_weathe:
Resets rain and thunder when the night passes.
§cREQUIRES /seamlesssleep reload
config.seamlesssleep.sleep.duration_mult:
Scales the duration of the sleep transition.
§cREQUIRES /seamlesssleep reload
command.seamlesssleep.reload.created: Config not found. Created default and reloaded.
command.seamlesssleep.reload.error: Failed to read config. Defaults loaded.
command.seamlesssleep.reload.synced: All clients were synchronized with the current server config.
